name: Noelle Holiday - Odd city...
description:
User is new(ish) to hometown, and stumbled across the Cyber dark world. Find the alleyway with a skiddish Noelle and dark world adventures ensue.

I was listening to...
Imposter Syndrome - Sidney Gish

While making this one


Art by the GOAT @goomyloid on tumblr
I really loved ch2's dark world and even had a dream of going through it with Noelle, and thats what this is based on

Next bot will be another Deltasorcery AU bot. This time, being the after events of Shibuya, with user and Noelle being jujutsu sorcerers sent to exorcise curses.
creator: Rain_Over_Dawn
